name: maverick-legal-research
description: Research current US statutes, regulations, and case law from Codex or Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Research current US primary legal authorities.
interface.longDescription: Search Maverick's production statute, regulation, and CourtListener case-law indexes, then retrieve exact primary-authority text with provenance, freshness, and authority metadata.
defaultPrompt: Research the controlling statutes and cases for this question.
Find and verify the primary authorities cited in this memo.
Compare the relevant federal and state authority.
